domain: robotics and automation end-effectors, mounts, adapters, and mechanisms

ideas.idea_title: Collaborative Robot Vacuum Gripper Manifold Block
ideas.product_context: A compact pneumatic manifold mounted at the wrist of a collaborative robot for picking flat packaging, sheet metal blanks, or molded plastic panels.
ideas.core_function: Distributes vacuum from one inlet to multiple suction cup ports while providing mounting features for the robot wrist and cup stems.
ideas.likely_main_part: CNC-machined aluminum manifold body with internal cross-drilled passages, threaded vacuum ports, O-ring face seals, and robot flange mounting holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires representing intersecting internal channels, sealed port bosses, counterbored mounting patterns, face grooves, and asymmetric port layout in one compact part.

ideas.product_context: A toolroom adapter used on an electric parallel gripper so operators can swap custom fingers between product changeovers without removing the gripper body.
ideas.core_function: Locks a removable gripper finger insert into a repeatable datum position using a wedge clamp and locating pins.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined steel coupler jaw with dovetail slide, spring plunger pocket, dowel holes, clamp screw bore, and finger attachment interface.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines sliding dovetail geometry, precision locating features, clamping clearances, threaded access holes, and nontrivial datum surfaces.

ideas.product_context: A small passive compliance module fitted between a robot wrist and a peg-in-hole insertion tool.
ideas.core_function: Allows limited radial and angular float while constraining axial motion during automated assembly.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cylindrical machined housing with nested bearing seats, radial spring pockets, retaining ring grooves, and bolt-circle interfaces on both ends.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests concentric stepped bores, internal grooves, circular patterns, spring pocket arrays, tolerance-sensitive bearing seats, and multi-interface alignment.

ideas.product_context: A rigid adjustable mount for placing an inspection camera beside a robot-mounted dispensing or picking tool.
ideas.core_function: Positions a camera at a repeatable angled offset from the tool centerline while allowing fine setup adjustment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined aluminum angled saddle with slotted camera rail, dowel-located robot-side pad, cable relief channel, and clamping screw bosses.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires angled reference planes, elongated slots, intersecting cable relief cuts, offset mounting datums, and a mix of aesthetic and functional chamfers.

ideas.idea_title: Delta Robot Pick Head Rotary Nozzle Adapter
ideas.product_context: A lightweight adapter used on a delta robot pick head to mount a small rotary vacuum nozzle for orienting lightweight parts in flight.
ideas.core_function: Connects the rotary actuator shaft to a vacuum nozzle while routing vacuum through the rotating center.
ideas.likely_main_part: Turned and milled aluminum adapter with central through-bore, keyed shaft pocket, nozzle thread, wrench flats, and radial set-screw holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests revolved shaft geometry combined with milled flats, keyed internal pockets, coaxial flow passages, cross holes, and small fastener details.

ideas.product_context: A machined nosepiece for a robot-mounted screwdriving spindle used on appliance or electronics assembly lines.
ideas.core_function: Centers the screw bit over the fastener while permitting controlled axial float and providing a vacuum path for screw retention.
ideas.likely_main_part: Hardened steel nosepiece body with tapered lead-in, sliding sleeve bore, vacuum side port, anti-rotation slot, and depth stop shoulder.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes tapered contact geometry, precision sliding bores, side ports into axial passages, slots that break through cylindrical walls, and stepped depth references.

ideas.idea_title: Pneumatic Sprue Cutter Robot Adapter Clevis
ideas.product_context: A custom adapter that mounts a pneumatic sprue cutter to a robot wrist for trimming molded plastic parts after ejection.
ideas.core_function: Holds the cutter at a fixed offset angle while resisting cutting loads and allowing blade clearance near the part.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined steel clevis bracket with angled wrist flange, forked cutter pocket, cross-pin holes, gusseted ribs, and clearance scallops around the blade path.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests fork geometry, angled mounting faces, load-bearing ribs, coaxial pin holes across separated ears, and swept clearance cutouts tied to tool motion.

ideas.product_context: A compact lever inside a small automation cell that flips a paddle to divert rejected parts from a conveyor lane.
ideas.core_function: Transfers motion from a pneumatic cylinder rod to a pivoting diverter paddle with defined mechanical stops.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined aluminum rocker arm with pivot bearing bore, rod-end clevis hole, offset paddle boss, hard-stop pads, and lightening pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines multiple functional axes, bearing bores, offset bosses, load paths, stop surfaces, and pockets that are not simple rectangular cuts.

ideas.product_context: A spacer mounted between a robot wrist and force-torque sensor where sensor cables must exit without being crushed or over-bent.
ideas.core_function: Provides a precise standoff and bolt pattern conversion while protecting radial cable exit paths.
ideas.likely_main_part: Circular machined spacer ring with dual bolt circles, counterbores, central clearance bore, radial cable windows, and relieved cable bend channels.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests annular geometry, two clocked bolt patterns, radial openings through a ring, counterbore depth control, and cable-clearance sculpting.

ideas.idea_title: Micro Gripper Parallel Jaw Stroke Limiter
ideas.product_context: An accessory mounted onto a miniature pneumatic gripper used for handling fragile medical or electronic components.
ideas.core_function: Limits jaw travel and adds adjustable hard stops so delicate parts are not over-compressed.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined stainless stop bridge with two precision stop screws, gripper body mounting holes, jaw clearance slots, and replaceable contact pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires narrow clearance slots, symmetric but adjustable stop features, threaded insert pockets, compact fastener access, and tight packaging around moving jaws.
